text: Heavy shelling was reported in the eastern districts of Aleppo city. At least 12 civilians were injured near the al-Sukkari neighborhood. The Syrian Observatory for Human Rights confirmed the incident.
title: Aleppo shelling injures civilians

text: Russian forces advanced toward Mariupol from the north. Fighting continues near the Azovstal plant.
title: Mariupol under siege

text: A checkpoint on the road between Kharkiv and Kupiansk was attacked. Three soldiers were killed.
title: Checkpoint attack in Kharkiv oblast

text: The hospital in Idlib city was hit by an airstrike. Médecins Sans Frontières reported damage to the pediatric ward.
title: Idlib hospital struck

text: Displacement from Raqqa province continues. Families are fleeing toward the Turkish border.
title: Raqqa displacement

text: Springfield, Illinois reported no incidents. Springfield, Massachusetts had a minor protest.
title: Springfield updates

text: The village of Bucha, northwest of Kyiv, was the scene of alleged atrocities. International investigators have arrived.
title: Bucha investigation

text: Fighting erupted in the district of Homs. The ancient city's old quarter was damaged.
title: Homs district clashes

text: A convoy was ambushed on the M4 highway near Saraqib. The road connects Aleppo and Idlib.
title: M4 highway ambush

text: The Donbas region saw renewed shelling. Donetsk and Luhansk oblasts reported casualties.
title: Donbas shelling
